'''Omano''' was a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of ''[[Dreadnaught-Four]]'', one of the six [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaughts]] that made up the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Outbound Flight]]''. He had the command of ''Dreadnaught-Four'', but had to share this task with the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Justyn Ma'Ning]], who coordinated the Jedi affairs on this ship. The longer the journey lasted, the more authority went to the Jedi, as [[Jorus C'baoth]] demanded more and more liberties. Finally, Omano on D-Four also had no influence on the activities of the Jedi.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
